ddt:Target.Name: UBP - X10 Version 2.1
ddt:Target.Description: UBP GEN09 (Projet X10) ---------------------- Pilot: Aymeric BRUNEAU (+33-1-768-51256 ---------------------- v1.0 - Creation of the diagnostic data base ---------------------- V1.1 1- Corrections of Manual bleeding procedure for the Pf-Lot (only compatible with B-sample ECU) - I/O Step3 + add tempo 1s between 10C0 and Step1 - I/O BOVc1 (Bit2 to Bit3) - Precision of the applicative perimeter (Only for B-sample ECU and Pf-Lot 2- Major change concern the update for S-Lot definition and C-sample ECU - add a Mode roller bench activation - add Torque blending monitoring informations - add Offset erasing for PWG and UBP sensors - add new screen "Energie measurement module" Not implemented in the Software => waitting for Project descision - add screen for new Evac & Fill + Manual bleeding sequences for S-Lot => will be coded for S-Lot ---------------------- V1.2 1- Corrections - correction gestion ref et fault type DTC 2- New screens & functions - add HBA function activation/desactivation - add Advanced diagnosis activation/desactivation - add screen for Advanced diagnosis datas memorized buffer - add routine for EV offset learning for S-lot - Manual bleeding procedure & sequences for S-lot ---------------------- V1.3 1- Corrections - F18E vehicule manufacturer spare part number - Creation of the screen 35 Manual bleeding with the add of step2 and 3a again at the end - Update of the screen 33, 34 for Manual bleeding procedure ---------------------- V1.4 - mise a jour manual bleeding apres 1er test sur SLot V1. - ajout auto iden ---------------------- V1.5 - mise a jour manual bleeding apres 2eme test sur SLot V1. ---------------------- V1.6 - mise à jour séquence 4c du manual bleeding . ---------------------- V1.7 - mise à jour DTC 508E ------- V1.8 - officialization - ajout auto iden ------- V1.9 - add reset soft - add data pump running cumulated ------- V2.0 - manual bleeding modification ------- V2.1 - manual bleeding modification

Item.Text: FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Freq Mod) / PWM (Pulse Width Mod) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or operation obstructed or blocked
UBP Pressure sensor Sense piston PsSP
UBP Pressure sensor Master Cylinder PsBP
UBP EV offset learning calibration parameter

Screen.Name: 31 - Pf-Lot definition - After Sale bleeding procedure

Label.Text: UBP B-sample Hydraulic circuit - Manual Bleeding procedure for Pf-Lot
-1-1- Place the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-1-2- Open the bleeder screw 1 of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Reservoir to PFS)
-1-3- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw 1 of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Reservoir to PFS)
-2-1- Maintain the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-2-2- Open the bleeder screw 3 of the Bosst Piston
-2-3- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw 3 of the Boost Piston
-4-1- Maintain the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-4-2- Open the bleeder screw 3 of the Boost Piston
-4-3- Then Energize the Boost Separation Valve (BSV), the Boost Inlet Valves (BIVc1 and BIVc2 and BIVs) and the Pump
-3-4- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw 2 of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Sense Piston to PFS)
-3-1- Maintain the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-3-2- Open the bleeder screw 2 of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Sense Piston to PFS)
-3-3- Then Energize the Simulator Valves (SSV1 and SSV2) and the Backup Separation Valve (BSV)
-4-4- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw 3 of the Boost Piston
-5-1- Stop the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir and Pressed stongly the Brake Pedal
-5-2- Then Energize the Boost Outlet Valves (BOVc1 and BOVc2 and BOVs)
-5-3- De-Energize the Boost Outlet Valves (BOVc1 and BOVc2 and BOVs)
Operations 5-2 to 5-4 shall be performed 8 times to push air through the Boost Outlet Valves to Reservoir
-3-5- And De-Energize the Simulator Valves (SSV1 and SSV2) and the Backup Separation Valve (BSV)
-4-5- And De-Energize the Boost Separation Valve (BSV) and the Boost Inlet Valves (BIVc1 and BIVc2 and BIVs) and the Pump
- STEP1 - => Reservoir to back of PFS
- STEP2 - => Reservoir through Sense Piston through BSV to Boost Piston
- STEP3 - => Reservoir through Sense Piston through SSV to front of PFS
- STEP4 - => Reservoir through Pump Elements through BSV through BOV to Reservoir
- STEP5 - => Reservoir through Sense Piston through BSV through BOV to Reservoir
UBP B-sample Hydraulic circuit - Factory Evac and Fill procedure for Pf-Lot
- EVAC - output control step1 to step6
- FILL - output control step1 to step6
- Restart the sequence of IO control, until the control of vacuum is Ok
- When the Evac control Tool is Ok => Go to the Filling strategy
This procedure can only be performed on dry hydraulic groups
The Evac sequence consists of 6 steps.
For the filling sequence, there is also 6 steps. The sequence (6 steps) is performed 6 times.
For the 5 first times, the sequence (6 steps) equals to the Evac sequence (6 steps), and for the last sequence (6 steps), the pump activation has been integrated.

Screen.Name: 33 - S-Lot definition - After Sale bleeding procedure SCREEN 1

Label.Text: UBP C-sample Hydraulic circuit - Manual Bleeding procedure for S-Lot -SCREEN 1-
-3a-1- Maintain the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-3a-3- Start actuation that Energize the Simulator Valves (SSV1 and SSV2) and the Backup Separation Valve (BSV)
- STEP1 - => Reservoir to back of PFS
- STEP2 - => Reservoir through Sense Piston through BSV to Boost Piston
- STEP3a - => Reservoir through Sense Piston through SSV to front of PFS
-0- if necessary - Pressure release with start actuation that Energize the Boost Separation Valve (BSV), the Boost Inlet Valves (BIVc1 and BIVc2) and the Boost Outlet Valves (BOVc1 and BOVc2)
- STEP 0 - => Release the potential existing Pressure of the Accumulator
Go To SCREEN 41 Function Activation/Inhibition and control that the PUMP is inhibited
-1-1- Place the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-1-2- Open the bleeder screw A of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Reservoir to PFS)
-1-3- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw A of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Reservoir to PFS)
-2-1- Maintain the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-2-2- Open the bleeder screw B of the Bosst Piston
-2-3- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw B of the Boost Piston
-3a-4- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw C of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Sense Piston to PFS)
-3a-2- Open the bleeder screw C of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Sense Piston to PFS)

Screen.Name: 34 - S-Lot definition - After Sale bleeding procedure SCREEN 2

Label.Text: -4a- Energizing of the Boost Separation Valve (BSV), the Boost Inlet Valves (BIVc1 and BIVc2 and BIVs), the Boost Outlet Valves (BOVc1 and BOVc2 and BOVs) and the Pump
- STEP4 - => Reservoir through Sense Piston through BSV through BOV to Reservoir and Reservoir through Pump Elements through BIV to Boost Piston in 5 sequences with different current actuations
UBP C-sample Hydraulic circuit - Manual Bleeding procedure for S-Lot -SCREEN 2-
-4e-Energizing of the Boost Separation Valve (BSV), the Boost Inlet Valves (BIVc1 and BIVc2 and BIVs) and the Pump
-4b- Energizing of the Boost Inlet Valves (BIVc1 and BIVc2 and BIVs) and the Pump
-4c- Energizing of the Boost Inlet Valves (BIVc1 and BIVc2 and BIVs) and the Pump
-4d- Energizing of the Boost Separation Valve (BSV), the Boost Inlet Valves (BIVc1 and BIVc2 and BIVs) and the Pump
- STEP3b - => Apply force on brake pedal PFS to Sense Piston through center poppet
-3b-1- Stop the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir
-3b-2- Press slowly the Brake Pedal and read a value over than 10mm => As soon as the 10 mm value is reached maintain the apply
-3b-3- Then press strongly until the ending of the stroke and in the same time Start actuation that Energize the Simulator Valves (SSV1 and SSV2) and the Backup Separation Valve (BSV).
-3b-4- After 2sec => Release the Brake Pedal as fast as possible to force the fluid through the center poppet
Stat all the step again for 3 times
-3b-5- Check if the Pedal stroke value is under than 10mm =>

Screen.Name: 35 - S-Lot definition - After Sale bleeding procedure SCREEN 3

Label.Text: UBP C-sample Hydraulic circuit - Manual Bleeding procedure for S-Lot -SCREEN 3-
- STEP5 = STEP2 Again - => Reservoir through Sense Piston through BSV to Boost Piston
Then Go To SCREEN 41 Function Activation/Inhibition and Activate the PUMP
- STEP6 = Reservoir through Sense Piston through SSV to front of PFS
-6-2- Open the bleeder screw C of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Sense Piston to PFS)
-6-1- Maintain the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-6-3- Start actuation that Energize the Simulator Valves (SSV1 and SSV2) and the Backup Separation Valve (BSV)
In the same time, Pump with successives applies on the brake pedal during the first 25 s
-6-4- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw C of the Pedal Feel Simulator (Sense Piston to PFS)
-2-1- Maintain the device providing 2bar of pressure in the reservoir With No Brake Pedal Pressed
-2-2- Open the bleeder screw B of the Boost Piston
-2-4- When fluid free of air comes out, close the bleeding screw B of the Boost Piston
-2-3- Pump with 20 successives applies on the brake pedal
HBB and EB inhibition shall only be used for the validations
PUMP inhibition shall only be used for the filling procedure.
Mode roller bench activation is created to autorize the regenerative braking even if ESC malfunction flags are received.

Send.RequestName: DataWrite.Mode roller bench function activation state
DataRead.Mode roller bench function activation state

Screen.Name: 42 - I/O Control - Hydraulic Valve & Pump control

Label.Text: Hydraulic valves and pump control - permanent activation (90 sec.)
Diagram of Hydraulic System (EV and Pump)

Label.Text: Electric gain on brake pedal pressed
Electric gain on gaz pedal released
As the record is integrated like a FIFO logical, if the Electrical gain measurement erasing is requested 4 times, the Current, N, N-1 and N-2 values are erased
Clear step by step the Electrical gain measurement

Label.Text: ABS regulation without driver brake request condition
Records in EEPROM during Key Off powerlatch if : Odometer>10m before previous record Or Airbag CrashOrder conditions.

Send.RequestName: Routine.Erase sensor offset brake pedal position 1 and 2.start

Label.Text: The confort pedal is degraded if this routine is not performed
This routine shall be start to learn the valve offset in the plant or in after sale when the part is replaced
This request is used to change of mission
